title: Consent Record
description: Per-installation consent state for one closed scope. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.consent` per `persistence.md` and `data-inventory.md`. Captured first at the `76-onboarding-consent` screen and revocable via the Privacy tab in screen 56-options. Wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`. The `ConsentSnapshot` definition below is the shape an exported save embeds so an import can re-prompt the user under their current device's policy.

state.description: `unset` is the only state that allows the runtime to prompt; `granted` unlocks the gated surface; `revoked` is user-initiated withdrawal; `denied` is age-gate or policy-driven default-off (e.g. `under13` profiles).

tier.description: `required` consents (e.g. `storage`) cannot be revoked without wiping the install; `optional` consents are revocable from the Privacy tab.

policyVersion.description: Privacy-policy version in effect at the moment of the recorded action; mirrored from `docs/architecture/privacy.md` and `docs/architecture/onboarding.md`. A bump invalidates `state === 'granted'` and re-routes the affected scope through onboarding.

method.description: `explicit` = user clicked Accept / toggle in onboarding or the Privacy tab. `import` = save-import flow re-prompted and the user accepted on this device. `legacy` = pre-policy v1 install, flagged for re-prompt. `session` = ephemeral session-only ack (e.g. unsigned-pack lobby ack).

acceptedAt.description: ISO 8601 wall-clock at the moment the user granted consent. Required when `state === 'granted'`. Never used for gameplay determinism.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 wall-clock at the moment the user revoked consent. Required when `state === 'revoked'`.

ConsentScope.description: Closed enum. `storage` is `tier: required` (always pre-accepted with explanation). `multiplayer`, `aiGeneration`, `telemetry`, `crashReports`, `analytics` are `tier: optional`, default `state: unset`. `unsignedPacks` is `tier: optional`, `method: session` (per-lobby ack only).

ConsentSnapshot.description: Frozen consent state embedded in an exported save under `consentSnapshot`. Save imports never auto-grant consent; the importer enumerates these records inside the onboarding flow with `method: 'import'` and asks the user to confirm per scope.
